content.query:
DROP VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_SourceGroups]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE VIEW [ODS].[vw_lkp_LP_SourceGroups]
AS 

SELECT
'FHI' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

SELECT
'PHI' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PHI_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'HSI' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_HSI_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'RTW' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_RTW_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'MAC' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MAC_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'SWR' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_SWR_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'PBC' as Division
,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_PBC_srg_SourceGroups]
 
 UNION

 SELECT
'MXH' as Division
 ,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_MXH_srg_SourceGroups]

  UNION

 SELECT
'CTA' as Division
 ,[id]
,[SourceGroup]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_CTA_srg_SourceGroups]
 ;
GO
